_comment: Final structured ticket summary; trace.tool_result references this via artifact_id
summary: Several users have been failing VPN authentication since 09:00 today ('authentication failed' / 'ike sa establishment failed'). The endpoint and network paths have been cross-validated (different hosts, mobile hotspot — all fail), so the issue is most likely on the server-side authentication chain. Suggested priority: investigate the VPN gateway and the auth backend.
missing_fields: Whether any change window occurred around 09:00

next_actions.action: Verify VPN gateway and auth services (RADIUS / AD LDAP) health
next_actions.rationale: When several users fail authentication simultaneously the issue is almost always on the server-side auth chain, not the endpoint

next_actions.action: Ask the user for VPN client version and the list of affected accounts
next_actions.rationale: Missing fields will block L2 from reproducing

next_actions.action: Check whether any change window occurred around 09:00 (DNS / certs / firewall)
next_actions.rationale: Certificate expiry or clock skew can cause auth failures

escalation_hint: Multiple users affected + no auth records on server → L2 networking team
